creator: mi@www.video-collage.com
text:
p5-Image-size installs perl5.003 (even though 5.002 is already there
	and most likely works just fine), but misses the net/p5-IO port, which
	is required for the run of imgsize 

	As a result p5-Image-size port is unusable

Fix: 

Install the said net/p5-IO . Have the maintainer add the RUN_DEPENDS
	line into makefile
